title: Smoking part of life since dawn of civilisation; we cannot prevent it: Kerala High Court
description: Nicotine and tar content labels on cigarette packets may go only so far to prevent smoking, the Kerala High Court observed on Thursday. [Sangeerthana M v. Union of India & Ors]A Division Bench of Chief Justice Soumen Sen and Justice Syam Kumar VM observed that smokers do not choose cigarettes based on nicotine or tar content, but clear labelling could aid in them making a conscious decision. "Smokers don't look at how much tar or nicotine is there in cigarettes. They go by the brand. People
